recipes.name: Directus
process: Instant REST and GraphQL API for any SQL database.
Beautiful no-code data studio for non-technical users.
Extensible through a modular internal architecture.
Perfect for headless CMS or internal business tools.

recipes.name: Infisical
process: Open-source secret management platform for teams.
Syncs environment variables across your entire stack.
End-to-end encryption for all sensitive data.
Infrastructure-as-code support with CLI and Terraform.

recipes.name: Budibase
process: Build internal tools in minutes with a visual builder.
Connects to MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and external APIs.
Features automated workflows and self-hosting options.
Optimized for high-performance business applications.

recipes.name: Umami
process: Privacy-focused, self-hosted web analytics.
Simple, clean alternative to Google Analytics.
Collects data without using cookies or invading privacy.
Extremely lightweight script for minimal page impact.

recipes.name: Logseq
process: A privacy-first, open-source knowledge management tool.
Uses local Markdown and Org-mode files for storage.
Features backlinking, page aliases, and powerful search.
Supports a vast plugin ecosystem for customization.

recipes.name: AppFlowy
process: The open-source alternative to Notion.
Built with Flutter and Rust for cross-platform speed.
Provides total control over your data and privacy.
Features wikis, databases, and kanban boards.

recipes.name: Focalboard
process: Self-hosted project management tool (Trello/Asana alt).
Helps teams organize tasks with a visual dashboard.
Part of the Mattermost ecosystem for seamless integration.
Supports multiple views including Board, Table, and Gallery.
